title: Making
summary: 本文探讨了AI在创意和制造过程中的应用，强调AI作为辅助工具而非替代人类创造力的角色。作者通过实例展示了AI如何帮助生成设计、优化流程和激发灵感，同时指出当前AI在理解复杂上下文和保持一致性方面的局限性。文章呼吁平衡技术利用与人类判断，确保AI增强而非削弱人类的创造性贡献。
summary_en: This article explores the role of AI in creative and making processes, emphasizing AI as a tool to augment rather than replace human creativity. It illustrates how AI can assist in generating designs, optimizing workflows, and sparking inspiration, while noting current limitations in understanding complex contexts and maintaining consistency. The piece advocates for a balanced approach that leverages technology while preserving human judgment to ensure AI enhances rather than diminishes human creative contributions.
